title: He Raised $26M Betting on Probabilities, Not Guesses | Koah Labs, Nic Baird
summary: Nic Baird, founder of Koah Labs, discusses his decision-making framework from competitive sailing applied to startup building. He argues that ad-based monetization is more viable than subscriptions for AI tools and identifies human trust adoption as the primary bottleneck for AI agents rather than technical limitations.
